# Cyber Threat Intelligence Report

> Independent, OSINT-based cyber threat intelligence (CTI) archive by Dennis Kim (김호광 / HoKwang Kim), CEO of Betalabs Inc. Reports cover supply-chain attacks, the zero-day ecosystem, North Korean / state-nexus threat actors, Web3 & crypto security, and AI/LLM security. All reports are TLP:GREEN and published for defensive, research, and policy purposes only. Most reports are multilingual (Korean / English / Japanese / Chinese). Naming convention: CTI-YYYY-MMDD-<SUBJECT>_<LANG>.md.

Author: Dennis Kim (김호광 / HoKwang Kim) — gameworker@gmail.com — https://github.com/gameworkerkim
Repository: https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT
License: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0
Languages: KR (한국어) / EN (English) / JP·JA (日本語) / CN·ZH (中文)
Last updated: 2026-05-30

## Latest Reports (Featured)

- [CTI-2026-0530-MARIMO — AI Agent at the Wheel](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0530-MARIMO_EN.md): First observed LLM-agent-driven intrusion. Pre-auth RCE on Marimo notebooks (CVE-2026-39987, CVSS 9.3, CISA KEV) followed by an autonomous four-stage pivot to internal PostgreSQL exfiltration in under an hour (Sysdig TRT). Severity CRITICAL. Langs: KR/EN/JP/CN.
- [CTI-2026-0530-GOGS — Gogs git rebase Argument Injection RCE](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0530-GOGS_EN.md): Any authenticated user achieves RCE via a malicious branch name injecting --exec into git rebase. Rapid7 CVSS 9.4, no CVE, unpatched since 2026-03-17, public Metasploit module. Cross-tenant breach. Severity HIGH. Langs: KR/EN/JP/CN.
- [CTI-2026-0530-JINX — JINX-0164 macOS & Supply-Chain Threat Actor](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0530-JINX_EN.md): Financially motivated cluster targeting crypto firms via LinkedIn lures; AUDIOFIX (Python) + MINIRAT (Go) macOS malware; @velora-dex/sdk 4.9.1 npm compromise; CI/CD lateral movement. DPRK-TTP overlap, no infra overlap (Wiz). Severity HIGH. Langs: KR/EN/JP/CN.
- [CTI-2026-0530-CHATGPHISH — ChatGPT Renderer Trust Flaw](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0530-CHATGPHISH_EN.md): chatgpt.com renderer trusts Markdown links/images from summarized third-party pages; indirect prompt injection enabling phishing, spoofed alerts, QR-code pivot, and IP/UA/Referer leakage (Permiso Security, Andi Ahmeti). No CVE; vendor replied "could not reproduce". Severity MEDIUM. Langs: KR/EN/JP/CN.
- [CTI-2026-0528-KELPDAO — KelpDAO LayerZero Bridge Hack](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0528-KELPDAO_EN.md): Cross-chain bridge compromise; single point of failure in off-chain verification infrastructure rather than on-chain contracts. Severity HIGH. Langs: KR/EN/JP/CN.

## AI & LLM Security

- [CTI-2026-0530-MARIMO](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0530-MARIMO_EN.md): LLM-agent-driven autonomous intrusion (first observed).
- [CTI-2026-0530-CHATGPHISH](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0530-CHATGPHISH_EN.md): ChatGPT renderer trust flaw / indirect prompt injection.
- [CTI-2026-0527-AICRYPTOJACK](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0527-AICRYPTOJACK_EN.md): AI cryptojacking campaign.
- [CTI-2026-0517-AICYBER](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0517-AICYBER_EN.md): North Korea's LLM-enabled hacking and agentic defense.
- [CTI-2026-0422-MCP](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/Cti%202026%200422%20mcp%20en.MD): Intelligent and sleeper attacks targeting Anthropic MCP; structural supply-chain risk.

## Supply Chain Attacks

- [CTI-2026-0530-JINX](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0530-JINX_EN.md): JINX-0164 macOS + npm (@velora-dex/sdk) supply chain.
- [CTI-2026-0530-GOGS](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0530-GOGS_EN.md): Self-hosted Git server RCE (Gogs).
- [CTI-2026-0527-GITEA](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0527-GITEA_EN.md): Gitea vulnerability.
- [CTI-2026-0527-GLASSWORM](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0527-GLASSWORM_EN.md): Self-propagating VS Code/OpenVSX supply-chain worm.
- [CTI-2026-0520-GITHUB](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0520-GITHUB.md): GitHub internal repository breach.
- [CTI-2026-0503-GITHUB](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0503-GITHUB_KR.md): GitHub threat analysis.
- [CTI-2026-0420-VERCEL](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0420-VERCEL_EN.md): Vercel breach via Context.ai OAuth; ShinyHunters; AI SaaS supply chain.

## Threat Actor Profiles

- [CTI-2026-0530-JINX](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0530-JINX_EN.md): JINX-0164 (financially motivated; DPRK-TTP overlap, no infra overlap).
- [CTI-2026-0526-KIMSUKY-PEBBLEDASH](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0526-KIMSUKY-PEBBLEDASH_EN.md): Kimsuky (APT43) PebbleDash and AppleSeed.
- [CTI-2026-0510-LAZARUS-GITHOOKS](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0510-LAZARUS-GITHOOKS_EN.md): North Korea Lazarus git hooks abuse.
- [CTI-2026-0507-SCARCRUFT](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0507-SCARCRUFT_EN.md): ScarCruft (APT37).
- [CTI-2026-0521-DPRK-TRENDS](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0521-DPRK-TRENDS_EN.md): North Korea hacking trends 2026.

## Web3 & Crypto

- [CTI-2026-0528-KELPDAO](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0528-KELPDAO_EN.md): KelpDAO LayerZero bridge hack; off-chain verification single point of failure.
- [CTI-2026-0526-UK_RUSSIA_CRYPTO_SANCTIONS](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0526-UK_RUSSIA_CRYPTO_SANCTIONS_EN.md): UK sanctions on Russian crypto.
- [CTI-2026-0427-LITECOIN](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/Cti%202026%200427%20litecoin%20en.MD): Litecoin vulnerability analysis.

## Endpoint, OS & Zero-Day

- [CTI-2026-0521-YELLOWKEY](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0521-YELLOWKEY_EN.md): Windows BitLocker bypass zero-day.
- [CTI-2026-0520-DRUPAL](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0520-DRUPAL.md): Drupal core critical zero-day (no patch).
- [CTI-2026-0520-EXCHANGE](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0520-EXCHANGE.md): Exchange Server vulnerability.
- [CTI-2026-0522-EDR3](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0522-EDR3_EN.md): EDR evasion threat analysis.
- [CTI-2026-0520-EVILTOKENS](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0520-EVILTOKENS.md): EvilTokens AI-generated device-code phishing PhaaS.
- [CTI-2026-0520-CPANEL](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0520-CPANEL.md): cPanel compromise.
- [CTI-2026-0430-COPYFAIL](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/Cti%20205%200430%20CopyFail%20kr.MD): CVE-2026-31431 'Copy Fail'.
- [CTI-2026-0320-CORUNA](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0320-CORUNA_KR.md): Coruna iOS Exploit Kit; cyber-weapons supply chain.

## Other

- [CTI-2026-0524-DUALTHREAT](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0524-DUALTHREAT_EN.md): Two concurrent threats analysis.
- [CTI-2026-0520-FAST16](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0520-FAST16%20EN.md): FAST16 analysis report.
- [CTI-2026-0514-CTRL_RussianRAT](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0514-CTRL_RussianRAT_LNK_RDP_KO.md): Russian RAT (LNK/RDP).
- [CTI-2026-0514-ChatGPT_DNS_SideChannel](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/CTI-2026-0514-ChatGPT_DNS_SideChannel_KO.md): ChatGPT DNS side channel.
- [CTI-2026-0510-MYTHOS-AI-VULN](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/Cti%202026%200510%20mythos%20ai%20vuln.MD): Mythos AI vulnerability analysis.
- [CTI-2026-0505-VIBE](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/blob/main/%EB%B0%94%EC%9D%B4%EB%B8%8C_%EC%9D%B8%EA%B3%B5%EC%A7%80%EB%8A%A5_%ED%95%B4%ED%82%B9%EC%9D%98_%EC%8B%9C%EB%8C%80_CTI-2026-0505-VIBE.md): Vibe — The Age of AI Hacking.

## Methodology & Frameworks

- TLP classification (default TLP:GREEN), four-level severity (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), and explicit High/Medium/Low confidence on each Key Judgment.
- Frameworks referenced: MITRE ATT&CK, MITRE ATLAS, NIST SP 800-61, NIST SP 800-207 (Zero Trust), NIST AI RMF, OWASP LLM Top 10, STIX/TAXII, Mandiant/Wiz UNC and cluster naming.
- Cross-references: AI-output-weaponization reports (CHATGPHISH, MCP) and crypto-dev-targeting reports (JINX, LAZARUS, KELPDAO) cite each other where relevant.
